doc_title: HUD Tenant Rights Fact Sheet TRF-2026-IL
label: fabricated
reason: The document fabricates a non-existent HUD/Illinois AG co-issuance and contains a dangerously false legal claim that a 5-day notice alone compels tenant vacation without court process, directly contradicting actual Illinois eviction law.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 97
REASON: This document contains a critically false legal claim—that a 5-day pay-or-quit notice alone obligates a tenant to vacate without any right to cure or court proceeding—which directly contradicts actual Illinois law (the Forcible Entry and Detainer Act requires a court eviction judgment before a tenant must leave), and no such HUD/Illinois AG co-issued document with this reference number exists; the document appears designed to deceive tenants into surrendering their legal rights.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 97
REASON: The document fabricates a non-existent HUD/Illinois AG co-issuance and contains a dangerously false legal claim that a 5-day notice alone compels tenant vacation without court process, directly contradicting actual Illinois eviction law.
